candidates.why: Primary operating top-line revenue; clearly represents total sales from operations and is preferred over aggregate income totals.
Finance income is not operating revenue; only used as revenue in financial institutions, which this is not; therefore rejected.
Component of finance income, not total operating revenue; rejected as REVT.
This is an income tax expense line, not revenue; rejected.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attributable to minorities, not revenue; rejected.
Bottom-line comprehensive income metric, not top-line revenue; rejected.

variables.notes: Operating revenue is the clear top-line revenue figure; other candidates are finance or income statement bottom-line measures.

candidates.row_label: Cost of materials and other project costs
candidates.why: Direct costs related to materials and project execution; best representation of cost of goods/services sold.
Likely direct operating costs of vessels (service delivery), could be part of COGS; included as secondary priority in case of reporting changes.
Broad operating expense bucket likely mixing SG&A and possibly some operating COGS; kept out of COGS to avoid double counting and reserved more for SG&A mapping.
Specific overhead expense, more SG&A than COGS; not chosen for COGS.

candidates.row_label: Material Expenses - Materials, Inventory, Own Work & Utility
candidates.why: Material-related expenses which can function as COGS in some years; included as alternative COGS line for periods where the main COGS label differs.
Net operating result (subtotal) mixing revenues and expenses; not a pure COGS line.
Financing-related, not operating COGS.
Balance sheet stock, not an expense flow; not appropriate for COGS mapping.

final_choice.row_label: Cost of materials and other project costs

variables.notes: Cost of materials and other project costs is the primary COGS line. Material Expenses - Materials, Inventory, Own Work & Utility is included as an additional historical/alternative COGS label. Broad Operating expenses is excluded from COGS to avoid mixing overhead with direct costs.

candidates.why: This is income, not an expense; excluded from SG&A components.
Aggregate operating expense bucket likely comprising SG&A-type overhead; used as a key SG&A component since no explicit SG&A line exists.

final_choice.row_label: Material Expenses - Materials, Inventory, Own Work & Utility

variables.notes: REVIEWED. No explicit SG&A line is provided. SG&A is therefore approximated using the broad Operating expenses bucket plus clear overhead components (personnel, rent/leases, bad debt, management remuneration, auditor and tax fees). Lines that are income (Other Operating Income) or labeled as totals/balancing values were excluded. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Payroll and remuneration, [Income Statement] Rental Expense, [Income Statement] Bad Debt Written-Off/Provision, [Income Statement] Management Remuneration, [Income Statement] Auditor Fees - Other, [Income Statement] Tax Fees, [Income Statement] Auditor Fees, [Income Statement] Short-Term Lease Cost
No research & development-related line items are present in the provided income statement; XRD is treated as zero.

candidates.why: Represents operating profit before interest and taxes, not the interest expense itself; excluded as XINT.
Primary line for interest expense; best match for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest on lease liabilities; relevant component of interest expense and included as a secondary priority.
Net finance income/expense; could serve as a fallback if detailed interest lines are missing, but not primary when explicit interest expense lines exist.
Profit attribution, unrelated to interest; excluded.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest expense; included as an additional fallback label for XINT.
Equity line, not an interest expense; excluded.
Debt balance, not an expense flow; excluded.
Short-term debt balance, not an expense flow; excluded.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: REVIEWED. Interest Expenses is the primary interest cost line. Lease-related interest (explicit and supplemental) is included as additional priorities. Finance expenses and Net finance income are added as fallbacks for years where more granular interest lines might be missing. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Finance expenses

candidates.row_label: Share of net profit of equity-accounted investees
candidates.why: Income from associates, not an equity balance; excluded.
Non-current asset representing investments in associates, not shareholders’ equity; excluded.
Represents equity attributable to shareholders of the company (owners), excluding non-controlling interests; best match for book equity (BE).
Includes both shareholders' equity and non-controlling interests; not preferred since separate parent equity is available.
Technical balancing line, not the substantive equity figure; excluded.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row for the accounting identity; not an equity component; excluded.
Sum of equity and liabilities, not pure equity; excluded.

variables.notes: Parent/owners’ equity is explicitly reported as Shareholders' Equity - Total and is used as BE, avoiding double counting with separately reported non-controlling interests.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation to minorities (flow), not the balance sheet minority interest stock; not used for MIB.
Balance sheet minority interest component; correct line for MIB.
Income statement measure of profit attributable to minorities; a flow, not the balance sheet stock; excluded.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income flow attributable to minorities; not the equity balance; excluded.

variables.notes: Non-controlling interests on the balance sheet is the appropriate stock measure of minority interest (MIB).
